data.title: Mobilize Financial Services reports growth in 2025, excluding equity-acccounted companies, with a rise in Average Performing Assets.
data.description: Excluding equity-accounted companies, the Average Performing Assets (APA) were calculated as the average performing outstandings, which included the assets associated with operational leasing activities. This metric encompassed the average of performing outstandings at month-end for retail customers, and the average of daily performing outstandings for the dealer network.

data.title: SSCP Lager Bidco AB (publ) released Q4 2025 interim report today, available online at www.logent.se.
data.description: SSCP Lager Bidco AB (publ) released its quarterly interim report today for the fourth quarter. The report is available for download on the website www.logent.se or through the provided link.

data.title: Pulsar Helium shares result of fundraise & TVR; restrictions apply for US, Australia, Japan, & South Africa.
data.description: The following information is restricted and should not be released, published, or distributed in the United States, Australia, Japan, or the Republic of South Africa. It is also not intended for transmission to, distribution to, or receipt by any national, resident, or citizen of these countries or any other jurisdiction where such actions may violate local securities laws.

data.title: Balmain unveils Destin de Balmain, a bold floral fruity eau de parfum capturing the energy of the independent Balmain woman.
data.description: Balmain Beauty has recently introduced its first luxury fragrance, Destin de Balmain, in Paris. This new feminine eau de parfum is a vibrant floral fruity scent that embodies the determined spirit of the modern Balmain woman, characterized by her independence, youthfulness, and fearlessness. Destin de Balmain represents the concept of seizing one's destiny, embodying a narrative of hope and endless opportunities. The refillable fragrance is designed for individuals who defy conventions and restrictions, seeking to express themselves freely.

data.title: transcosmos holds Roblox-based seminar in Wakayama to develop Future Creators. Supports GGX project in gaming festival.
data.description: transcosmos is backing Game Grove X (GGX), a game development initiative led by Wakayama Prefecture, assisting in nurturing next-generation customer experience talent. During the GGX Games Showcase, a local gaming festival, the project aims to refine young creators' skills. This program will help improve and verify their abilities, showcasing their potential to contribute to the industry. The event is scheduled for February 20, 2026, in Tokyo.
